inputs.label: Total Cholesterol

businessContext_i18n.tr: Kan lipit panelinden toplam kolesterol seviyesi

businessContext_i18n.fr: Cholestérol à lipoprotéines de haute densité (bon cholestérol)

inputs.label: LDL Cholesterol (Direct)
